[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010110 3
1 1001110 4
2 0100100 2
3 1111101 6
4 0111001 4
5 0010011 3
6 0000101 2
7 0010001 2

01 10 0000000 a

67 76 0000001 1
